sections.title: Possessive adjectives
sections.content:
We use these words before a noun to show who has something:

• **my** book = the book is mine
• **your** car = the car is yours
• **his** dog = the dog is his
• **her** bag = the bag is hers
• **its** name = the name of it
• **our** house = the house is ours
• **their** children = the children are theirs

sections.title: Possessive 's
sections.content:
We add **'s** to a name or noun to show who has something:

• **Tom's** book = the book of Tom
• **my mother's** car = the car of my mother
• **the dog's** tail = the tail of the dog

questions.question: This is _____ book.
questions.explanation: Before a noun we use my.

questions.question: That is _____ car. (Tom)
questions.explanation: We add 's to show it is Tom's car.

questions.question: _____ name is John.
questions.explanation: His name = the name of him.
